# Time

Playback position and duration state for the player store

Tracks playback position and duration.

## API Reference

### State

Property

Type

Details

`currentTime`

`number`

â–¸

Description

Current playback position in seconds.

`duration`

`number`

â–¸

Description

Total duration in seconds (0 if unknown).

`seeking`

`boolean`

â–¸

Description

Whether a seek operation is in progress.

### Actions

Action

Type

Details

`seek`

`(time: number) => Promise<number>`

â–¸

Description

Seek to a time in seconds. Returns the actual position after seek.

### Selector

Pass `selectTime` to [`PlayerController`](./player-controller.md) to subscribe to time state. Returns `undefined` if the time feature is not configured.

time-display.ts

```
import { createPlayer, MediaElement, selectTime } from '@videojs/html';
import { videoFeatures } from '@videojs/html/video';

const { PlayerController, context } = createPlayer({ features: videoFeatures });

class TimeDisplay extends MediaElement {
  readonly #time = new PlayerController(this, context, selectTime);
}
```
